helpful: The filed-document manifest clearly reported completeness and extraction status.
The statpack supplied modern-cert, circuit, relist, and paid-petition baselines.
gaps: A genuinely pre-disposition snapshot was needed; the supplied snapshot revealed the outcome.
The petition and reply text were not provisioned, leaving only the opposition's account of Alabama's arguments.
notes: I deliberately avoided MCP and corpus case retrieval after the provisioned snapshot revealed the disposition.
